author: Tester <t@t.com>
body:
# Findings

The v3 storage epic's celebratory delete shipped clean.
`refuse_self_hosted_write` and the `JJF_ALLOW_SELF_HOST`
env var are gone from the codebase. 16 call sites in
`main.rs` deleted. `crates/jjf/tests/self_host_guard.rs`
deleted. CLAUDE.md's "Operating in a colocated jj+git
repo" section rewritten to six positive lines.
`docs/cli-json.md` `self_hosted_write_refused` table row
and subsection gone. Net change: -667 lines.

The headline test: `env -u JJF_ALLOW_SELF_HOST jjf pull
origin` from inside `~/p/jjforge` (the source tree) ran
clean; git HEAD stayed on `refs/heads/main` at
`3a516da2`. No drift. This very closing comment is being
filed without the guard. The bug `08cf14b` guarded
against can no longer reproduce — v3 writes go straight
to git refs, the jj working copy is never touched.

# Recommendation

Closed. The chain ends here.

# Confidence

High. The acceptance criteria all tick. The empirical
test (mutate from the source tree without the env var)
passed.

# Open follow-ups

None for this ticket. `bd98097` (the epic) closes next.
`cc2fa96 host-asterinas-migrate` is unblocked; the
re-attempt is a separate dispatch under the
`host-asterinas` epic.
